Package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.saml

Class SamlMetadataResolvers

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.saml.SamlMetadataResolvers
public final class SamlMetadataResolvers extends Object
Convenience factories for building MetadataResolver instances backed by an OpenSAML implementation.

Juneau ships convenience factories only — no bundled default MetadataResolver singleton. Applications either:

  • Call file(File) for a local SAML metadata file (typical dev/staging setup).
  • Call url(String) for a remote /metadata endpoint (typical production setup).
  • Build their own MetadataResolver directly using OpenSAML APIs (advanced).

Both factories return resolvers that are already initialized — ready to hand to SamlAssertionValidator.Builder.metadataResolver(MetadataResolver) immediately.

Notes:

The URL factory uses the JDK HttpClient (Java 17) to fetch the metadata blob once at construction time and wraps the parsed DOM in a DOMMetadataResolver. No background refresh is performed; applications that need periodic refresh should construct their own HTTPMetadataResolver (from opensaml-saml-impl) with an Apache HttpClient + refresh policy.

Since:
10.0.0

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static org.opensaml.saml.metadata.resolver.MetadataResolver

    Creates a MetadataResolver that loads SAML 2.0 metadata from the given file.
    static org.opensaml.saml.metadata.resolver.MetadataResolver

    Creates a MetadataResolver that loads SAML 2.0 metadata from the given Path.

  • Method Details

    • file

      public static org.opensaml.saml.metadata.resolver.MetadataResolver file(File file) throws IOException
      Creates a MetadataResolver that loads SAML 2.0 metadata from the given file.

      The file is parsed at construction time and re-parsed on disk modification by the underlying FilesystemMetadataResolver.

      Parameters:
      file - The metadata XML file on the local filesystem. Must exist and be readable.
      Returns:
      An initialized MetadataResolver.
      Throws:
      IOException - If the file cannot be parsed or initialized.

    • url

      public static org.opensaml.saml.metadata.resolver.MetadataResolver url(String url) throws IOException
      Creates a MetadataResolver that fetches SAML 2.0 metadata from the given URL once and serves it from an in-memory DOM.

      Fetch happens on the calling thread with a 30-second connect/request timeout. Applications that need periodic refresh should construct an OpenSAML HTTPMetadataResolver directly with an Apache HttpClient.

      Parameters:
      url - The metadata URL. Must be an absolute HTTPS or HTTP URL.
      Returns:
      An initialized MetadataResolver.
      Throws:
      IOException - If the URL cannot be fetched or the metadata is malformed.

    • file

      public static org.opensaml.saml.metadata.resolver.MetadataResolver file(Path path) throws IOException
      Creates a MetadataResolver that loads SAML 2.0 metadata from the given Path.

      Convenience overload of file(File); useful for callers that have a Path on hand.

      Parameters:
      path - The metadata XML file as a Path.
      Returns:
      An initialized MetadataResolver.
      Throws:
      IOException - If the file cannot be parsed or initialized.
